raw: Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date. Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 6 people at $10 off the at-the-gate admission rate for each guest. Rates change seasonally. Additional instructions: -Tickets must be bought at the ticket booth. Online purchase is not allowed with pass. -Discount is not valid on holidays, for packages, or for use at evening events. -The farm and maze are open weather permitting. Please call or visit the Davis Farmland website the day of your visit to check their status.
